body:
## Implementation summary

Added a scene-level Collaboration panel to the story editor sidebar (BIN-84).

**New files:**
- `src/types/collaboration.ts` — thread, comment, and decision type definitions
- `src/lib/collaboration.ts` — localStorage CRUD: create/update/filter threads, add comments, record decisions, unresolved count
- `src/components/CollabPanel/CollabPanel.tsx` — container with inbox/decision-log toggle, filter state, mutation refresh
- `src/components/CollabPanel/CollabInboxToolbar.tsx` — status/assignee/scene filters with unresolved count
- `src/components/CollabPanel/CollabThreadRow.tsx` — card row with type/status chips, quick-status buttons, jump-to-scene
- `src/components/CollabPanel/CollabThreadDetail.tsx` — full thread view: comment timeline, accept/reject decision flow (immutable after recorded), status/assignee controls
- `src/components/CollabPanel/AddThreadModal.tsx` — dialog with focus trap, type selector, scene picker
- `src/components/CollabPanel/CollabBadge.tsx` — unresolved count badge

**Modified files:**
- `src/app/story/[id]/page.tsx` — added Notes/Collab tab bar, integrated CollabPanel, CollabBadge in tab label
- `src/app/story/[id]/page.module.css` — sidebar tabs, collab panel container styles

All styles use approved grayscale tokens only. No new global routes.

## Branch

ticket/BIN-84

## Commits

- `b54b421` Implement scene-level collaboration inbox (BIN-84)

## Test evidence

```
npm run build

 ✓ Compiled successfully in 1162ms
 ✓ Linting and checking validity of types
 ✓ Generating static pages (6/6)

Route (app)                              Size  First Load JS
└ ƒ /story/[id]                        30.2 kB         132 kB
```

Build passes with no TypeScript errors or lint warnings.

## Known limitations

- v1 is single-user/localhost only; no real-time sync
- Assignees are free-text names (no validation)
- Jump-to-scene switches to corkboard view; scene focus within corkboard is a console.log stub (requires scene navigation work in a future ticket)

## Handoff

Assign to: Code Reviewer

Implementation plan added to issue description.

- New files: `src/types/collaboration.ts`, `src/lib/collaboration.ts`, `src/components/CollabPanel/*`
- Modified: `src/app/story/[id]/page.tsx`, `page.module.css`
- Key decisions: v1 is single-user localStorage (no real-time sync); decision records are immutable after creation; assignee is free-text; sidebar expands to 'collab' tab mode; unresolved badge shown on sidebar tab label and optionally in editorHeader

Assign to: Code Monkey
Recovery ticket; previous BIN-80 stuck (checkout 409) and cancelled.
